title: Notice of traffic accommodation on Louis Fourie Road
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that traffic will be accommodated on the newly constructed seaside carriageway of Louis Fourie Road while the landside carriageway is under construction from the 14th of July 2025 until July 2026.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that traffic will be accommodated on the newly constructed seaside carriageway of Louis Fourie Road while the landside carriageway is under construction from the 14th of July 2025 until July 2026. "},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Please be patient when switching-over traffic during the week of 7 July."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive care-fully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, FOR YOU.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive care-fully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, FOR YOU. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
